overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a dense neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player drives a futuristic vehicle through commercial districts featuring Japanese-inspired signage, digital billboards, and encounters a red car blocking the road before continuing through the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with Japanese signage

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily through the neon-lit commercial district at moderate speed, observing the vibrant signage

entered.detail: dense collection of pink and cyan neon signs in Japanese script lining the street
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
traditional red paper lanterns hanging outside storefronts
multi-story cyberpunk architecture with glass facades and neon trim
tall poles with greenish artificial lighting illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a dense cyberpunk commercial district at night. The street is lined with vibrant neon signage in Japanese script, red paper lanterns, and towering commercial buildings with glass facades. The vehicle moves steadily forward through the asphalt street, passing digital billboards and street lights while the HUD displays speed and navigation data.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with concrete barriers and guardrails

events.description: red car pulls out and stops in the intersection, blocking the forward path
braking sharply to avoid collision, speed drops to near zero
accelerating after steering around the red car obstacle

agents.ego_description: braking to avoid collision with the red car, waiting briefly, then steering around the obstacle to continue

notable_agents.action: red car stopped across the intersection blocking the path, headlights on
person in white clothing standing near the sidewalk observing the traffic

entered.detail: yellow and white striped concrete barriers with red lights marking the road edge
metal safety railings along the side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches an intersection marked by concrete barriers and guardrails. A red car suddenly blocks the path, forcing the driver to brake sharply and maneuver around it. The scene features prominent traffic control barriers and metal railings while the vehicle navigates the obstacle, with a pedestrian visible standing on the distant sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial street with storefronts and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: accelerating and cruising through the commercial area, passing pedestrians on the sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking along the sidewalk near a bench

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with glowing interface on the sidewalk
wall covered in colorful street art and cyberpunk-style graffiti

segments.scene_description: After clearing the obstacle, the vehicle accelerates through a mixed commercial area featuring storefronts at street level and pedestrians walking along the sidewalks. The environment includes vending machines, graffiti-covered walls, and various neon signs. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks along the right sidewalk as the vehicle passes by commercial buildings and guardrails.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: cruising at higher speed through the dense commercial core with large digital advertisements

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements high on building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through the dense commercial core of the city, dominated by massive digital billboards and intense neon lighting. The vehicle moves at higher speed past concrete barriers and commercial buildings, with large curved advertisement screens visible on the left. The street maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant pink and cyan neon illumination throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a dense cyberpunk commercial district that evolves from a steady cruise into a high-speed navigation of the city's neon core. It begins by gliding past vibrant Japanese signage, red paper lanterns, and towering glass facades while the vehicle's HUD tracks speed and navigation. As the camera approaches an intersection, the flow is interrupted by a red car blocking the path, forcing a sharp brake and a maneuver around concrete barriers and metal railings. The scene then opens back up into a mixed commercial area, passing graffiti-covered walls, vending machines, and a pedestrian in a yellow jacket. Finally, the vehicle accelerates into the heart of the district, where the environment shifts toward massive curved digital billboards and intense pink and cyan illumination.
